_note: Few-shot routing examples for the LLM intent router (P5-FUT-006). Add examples to improve accuracy for edge cases. Cap at 9 used per request (see _build_router_prompt). Version bumped to 1.2 by BUILD_PROGRAM_ROUTING_INTEGRITY_V1.md Phase R-FIX (docs/ROUTING_INTEGRITY_FINDINGS.md Finding 2): 13 examples using pre-collapse alias ids (auto-redteam, auto-pentest, auto-blueteam, auto-purpleteam*, auto-mistral, auto-agentic) relabeled to their canonical post-collapse base workspace id, matching routing_descriptions.json's own 1.1->2.0 migration — message text unchanged, only the workspace label corrected. Variant intent (e.g. redteam) is recovered post-classification by _infer_variant, not carried by the few-shot label.
